response.justification: The candidate has relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure, TypeScript, and cloud technologies, aligning with the job requirements. However, the resume lacks direct mention of experience with vector databases or retrieval-augmented generation architectures.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Strong background in full-stack development and cloud technologies
concerns: Lack of direct experience with vector databases and RAG architectures
No explicit mention of experience with major cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure)
Limited information on LLM performance metrics and optimization techniques

key_factors.factor: Lack of direct experience with vector databases and RAG
